description: Creates a rolling-period mapping table for trend analysis using a high-performance WHILE loop.
template:
// --- AS-OF TABLE ---
[Temp_AsOf_Dates]: 
LOAD DISTINCT [{{dateField}}] AS [AsOfDate] 
RESIDENT [{{sourceTable}}];

[AsOf_Table]:
LOAD 
    [AsOfDate] AS [AsOf Date], 
    [AsOfDate] AS [{{dateField}}], 
    'Current Day' AS [Period Type] 
RESIDENT [Temp_AsOf_Dates];

CONCATENATE ([AsOf_Table])
LOAD 
    [AsOfDate] AS [AsOf Date], 
    Date(AddMonths([AsOfDate], -IterNo()+1)) AS [{{dateField}}], 
    'Rolling 12 Months' AS [Period Type] 
RESIDENT [Temp_AsOf_Dates] 
WHILE IterNo() <= 12;

DROP TABLE [Temp_AsOf_Dates];

description: Implements 80/20 Pareto segmentation across two tables joined via a link table. Uses a deterministic 4-pass pattern: join → aggregate → pre-calculate total → apply running cumulative flag. The join key between factTable and linkTable is derived automatically from the factTable name using the naming convention Fact_X → %Key_X.

Generates a product co-occurrence table for basket analysis. Output columns are [Product_ID] (connects to Dim_Products) and [Co_Product_ID] (a second associative axis). Only produces results when multiple distinct items share the same order ID. This table is intentionally a one-sided bridge.
template:
// --- MARKET BASKET ({{itemField}} co-occurrences within {{idField}}) ---
[Basket_A]:
LOAD [{{idField}}], [{{itemField}}]
RESIDENT [{{factTable}}];

JOIN ([Basket_A])
LOAD [{{idField}}], [{{itemField}}] AS [Co_{{itemField}}]
RESIDENT [{{factTable}}];

[Final_Market_Basket]:
NOCONCATENATE
LOAD
    [{{itemField}}],
    [Co_{{itemField}}],
    Count([{{idField}}]) AS CoOccurrences
RESIDENT [Basket_A]
WHERE [{{itemField}}] <> [Co_{{itemField}}]
GROUP BY [{{itemField}}], [Co_{{itemField}}];

DROP TABLE [Basket_A];

description: Wraps categorical fields in Dual() logic based on identified mapping pairs.
Optimizes specific link keys using the AutoNumber function.
